# tests/product-rd/integration/test_integration.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-05T10:00:44Z

## Purpose
Tier 2 — Integration tests for product-rd.

Recommended: pytest + real PostgreSQL + real Redis.
Per global §64.30 tier 2: cross-service flows touch real DB + cache.

## Process
### Functions
- `test_product_rd_db_roundtrip()`: REPLACE — verify product-rd table CRUD round-trips against real Postgres.
- `test_product_rd_queue_dispatch()`: REPLACE — verify product-rd task enqueue + consume via Redis.
